descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.4 for sale 2025 | 4 Cabins + 4 Heads 

Tax not Paid | Excellent Condition

Little Use - Like New 

(18% OFF MARKET PRICE)

 

Introducing the Bali 4.4, a lightly used catamaran from 2025, measuring a 13.75 meters in overall length. Crafted from durable fiberglass, this vessel combines strength with elegance, ensuring a smooth sailing experience.

Fully Equipped (Autopilot, AC, Fresh Water Maker, Underwater Lights, Touch Screen, Generator...)

With its modern design and thoughtful amenities, the Bali 4.4 is perfect for those seeking both comfort and performance on the open sea.

Specifications:

  • Length: 13.75 m
  • Beam: 7.40 m
  • Draft: 1.27 m
  • Combined 80 amp battery charger/inverter 12V (or 24V)/230V - 2000VA
  • Raymarine Electronic  PACK including : Pilote auto P70S, GPS plotter AXIOM 7", MULTI I70S, VHF RAY 63 + VHF RAY MIC at steering station, AIS receiver transmitter, full touch screen AXIOM 12" at steering station
  • Hifi Radio Fusion 6 HP bluetooth (saloon, flybridge and front cockpit)
  • Domestic fridge freezer (615L) with chilled water, ice maker and dedicated inverter 230V

Rigging:

  • Reinforced Dacron fully-battened Mainsail & Solent with UV protection + Lazy-Bag & Lazy-Jacks + sheets
  • Electric winch for solent

Mechanics - Safety Equipment:

  • 2  x NANNI 65 hp instead of NANNI 40hp
  • Pair of 3-blade folding propellers
  • Generator 10 KW 50hz with soundshield and remote control 230V
  • Kit solar panels: 4 x 100W panels (400W)
  • Safety equipment for 10 with 1 liferaft without EPIRB (lifejacket with harness, 1.85m lanyard with 2 snap-shackles,10-person liferaft, 10 green light-sticks, horseshoe life buoy, self-righting light, buoy and light bracket, 3 hand flares, 50ZA Iris compass, logbook, flashlight, 10L bucket, first aid kit)

Comfort:

  • Reverse cycle aircond in hulls (4 cabins version) 230V/50Hz
  • Watermaker 230V 240L/H (Generator required)
  • Large model freshwater electric toilet
  • Sea water pump at galley & anchor
  • Microwave oven 230V
  • 4-burner cooking hob in glass and large capacity oven instead of standard size

Exterior Setup:

  • Canvas helm station bimini
  • Set of folding sun loungers foredeck
  • LED underwater lighting blue under each transom (4 spots)
  • Electrical davit

Whether you're planning a weekend getaway or an extended cruise, this catamaran promises an unforgettable experience. Contact us now for more information, or to book a viewing!
